_comment: Machine-readable contract for data.json. The single source the contract-drift check (tests/test_data_contract.py) holds the fetcher, the renderer's EXPECTED_KEYS, and docs/data-schema.md against. Update this in the same PR as any schema change (see data-schema.md > Maintenance).

player_rank_stats._comment: Slugs emitted in player_ranks[id] per group. The renderer's myRanks.<slug> reads MUST be a subset of these — a read with no emit is the G1 blank-rail bug.
